Any cause of action arising under these Terms of Use or the use of the website including but not limited to access to and use of NICE guidance shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.
Amending these terms of use 46. From time to time NICE may at its sole discretion amend these Terms of Use. Your continuing use of these websites constitutes your acceptance of and agreement to any changed terms and conditions. NICE will post details of any such changes on the websites in a timely manner.
Enforceability 47. If any provision of these Terms of Use is held to be invalid or unenforceable, such provision shall be struck out and the remaining provisions shall be enforced.
Interpretation 48. Headings are for reference purposes only and in no way define, limit, construe or describe the scope or extent of such section.
No waiver 49. Our failure to act with respect to a breach of these Terms of Use by you or others does not waive our right to act with respect to subsequent or similar breaches.
Entire Agreement 50. These Terms of Use set forth the entire understanding and agreement between you and the NICE with respect to your use of these websites and your relationship, from that use, with us.
